message:
security(context): Add ReDoS protection for deprecated pattern matching

- Add safeDeprecatedPatternMatcher function with length and nested
  quantifier checks to prevent catastrophic regex backtracking
- Update both deprecated pattern matching locations to use the safe
  matcher instead of direct new RegExp() calls
- Also includes: utils.ts auto-regex detection enhancement, cass.ts
  force variable fix
